summary_variants.product_management: Technical Product Leader with 15+ years of experience scaling B2B SaaS platforms at hyper-growth companies. Expert in architecting high-volume data pipelines and AI-driven features that drive measurable revenue growth across complex marketplaces and enterprise ecosystems. Proven track record of bridging deep engineering requirements and high-impact go-to-market strategy.
summary_variants.operations: Operations and program leader with 15+ years building scalable systems across B2B SaaS and enterprise platforms. Skilled at designing processes, standing up cross-functional teams, and driving delivery velocity in complex organizations. Track record of transforming chaotic workflows into repeatable, measurable operations that accelerate business outcomes.
summary_variants.government: Technology and product leader with 15+ years building platforms that serve large, diverse user populations. Experienced in stakeholder management across complex organizations, data-driven decision-making, and delivering systems that balance compliance requirements with user needs. Background in environmental policy and computer science.
summary_variants.customer_success: Product and customer success leader with 15+ years driving retention, expansion, and satisfaction across B2B SaaS platforms. Expert in building analytics systems that surface customer health signals, designing feedback loops with advisory boards, and partnering with go-to-market teams to turn product insights into revenue growth.
summary_variants.ai_technical: Technical founder and AI product leader with 15+ years shipping B2B platforms and a hands-on focus on agentic AI systems. Currently building production AI tools using LLMs and agentic frameworks. Deep background in data pipelines, API architecture, and scaling infrastructure at companies processing 20M+ daily transactions.

bullets.text: Directed a company-wide transformation for a media SaaS client, introducing agile rituals and OKRs that increased delivery velocity by 25% and restored cross-functional trust.
Building "The Dossier," an advanced AI agent tool evolved from a custom automated job-search agent, using LLMs and agentic frameworks to automate complex research tasks and business operations.
Co-founded and operationalized a property management business, architecting a custom Next.js platform to automate core leasing, maintenance, and vendor coordination workflows.
Consulting for early-stage tech startups on systems and product strategy, defining MVPs and GTM frameworks for diverse SaaS and infrastructure initiatives.

Delivered AI product strategy and vertical GTM roadmap for a B2B SaaS founder, identifying organic PMF signal from existing customer data and defining 3 AI features buildable on the current data model without a platform rewrite.
Spearheaded the overhaul of the media ingestion infrastructure to handle 20M+ daily images, achieving a 62.5% reduction in p95 latency and increasing throughput by 20x.
Orchestrated a cross-functional AI initiative with data science teams to integrate AI-generated video into digital assets, driving a 48% increase in sales velocity across major US markets.

Managed external data vendor strategies and partnerships, optimizing data OKRs and maintaining listing coverage across hundreds of MLS feeds to ensure reliable data availability for downstream engineering teams.
Directed product strategy for high-volume data pipelines, customer analytics, and consumer APIs within a leading multifamily performance platform.
Led the redesign of a complex data model for a new analytics product, securing cross-functional buy-in from engineering and product leadership to ensure long-term architectural scalability.
Spearheaded a rapid, 5-week cross-functional launch of a self-guided tour MVP, resulting in a 16% increase in monthly adoption and a 53% increase in property-level engagement.

Architected API ecosystem strategy for customer-facing REST APIs, standardizing versioning, governance, and onboarding across 12+ partner integrations. Cut time-to-integrate from ~3 months to under 4 weeks and reduced one-off engineering requests by ~40%.
bullets.metric: ~3 months to under 4 weeks, ~40% reduction in requests

experience.title: Head of Product / Group Product Manager

bullets.text: Streamlined a global video platform portfolio by sunsetting legacy products and integrations, improving engineering focus and overall delivery by 50%.
Launched an award-winning enterprise video product and a QoS analytics suite that generated 10% of total company revenue through a 90% upsell rate.
Increased customer renewal rates from 90% to 97% by formalizing a Customer Advisory Board and Customer Council.
Secured funding and led development for a new self-service live video platform, achieving a 16% MoM growth rate.
Developed and launched the flagship, award-winning enterprise live video webcasting product used daily by Fortune 100 companies.
